ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "greenness_degree" REAL /* Greenness degree of the environment */,
  "cleanliness_degree" REAL /* Cleanliness degree of the environment */,
  "crowdedness_degree" REAL /* Crowdedness degree of the environment */,
  "noisy_degree" REAL /* Noise level of the environment */,
  "skin_feeling_degree" REAL /* Skin feeling degree of the environment */,
  "stress_degree" REAL /* Stress level of the environment */,
  "personal_aqi_degree" REAL /* Personal air quality index (AQI) of the environment */,
  "safety_degree" REAL /* Safety degree of the environment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level of the environment */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the environment */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., sensor, survey, external feed) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_of_day" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time of day */,
  "afternoon" REAL /* Afternoon time of day */,
  "early_morning" REAL /* Early morning time of day */,
  "evening" REAL /* Evening time of day */,
  "morning" REAL /* Morning time of day */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_info" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic information */,
  "distance_to_airport" REAL /* Distance to the airport */,
  "num_people" REAL /* Number of people in the area */,
  "num_motorcycles" REAL /* Number of motorcycles in the area */,
  "num_cars" REAL /* Number of cars in the area */,
  "traffic_congestion_level" TEXT /* Traffic congestion level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data_time_of_day" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time of day */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., average, maximum, minimum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data_traffic_info" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic information */,
  "rms_contrast" REAL /* Root mean square (RMS) contrast of the environment */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., average, maximum, minimum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, city official) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, survey, external feed) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
